title: SICP 3.3.4 digital-circuit simulator
goal: Implement the SICP 3.3.4 digital-circuit simulator as a runnable Eshkol probe, including wires, agenda scheduling, primitive gates, compound circuits, and propagation behavior.
next_actions: Implement make-wire, get-signal, set-signal!, add-action!, after-delay, propagate, and the agenda/queue machinery needed by the simulator.
Implement inverter, and-gate, or-gate, half-adder, and full-adder examples.
Assert deterministic propagation results and event ordering for representative circuits.
acceptance: The probe passes under AOT compile/run.
ICC sicp-completeness observes sicp_ch3_digital_circuit_r and sicp_ch3_digital_circuit_aot as PASS.
ux_payoff: Covers SICP's event-driven simulation system and stress-tests mutable queues plus scheduled effects.
